title: oenothera decorticans
intro: Oenothera decorticans, also known as Fringed Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially helping to manage conditions such as diabetes and high blood pressure. Oenothera decorticans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
